entries.name: Obsession
entries.definition: You pursue goals with excessive fixation.

entries.name: Rigidity
entries.definition: You resist necessary change and adaptation.

entries.name: Impatience
entries.definition: You rush natural processes and timing.

entries.name: Severity
entries.definition: You judge and punish too harshly.

entries.name: Indulgence
entries.definition: You lack proper restraint and discipline.

entries.name: Manipulation
entries.definition: You control others for your purposes.

entries.name: Zealotry
entries.definition: You pursue goals with blind fanaticism.

entries.name: Deception
entries.definition: You obscure or distort the truth.

entries.name: Negligence
entries.definition: You fail to maintain proper attention.
